name: Coronation

abilities.name: You Are Honored
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model attacks an enemy model and receives a raise, it may summon a Gift of Thorns within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Cruel Promises
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a model with a Wreathed upgrade.
actions.effects: The target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model. Then, the target must take a TN 15 Wp duel. If it succeeds, it may discard one Wreathed upgrade.

extraction_notes: The attack action shows '(bb)' symbol indicating it is signature (costs 2 AP)
Skill column shows '(magic)12"' indicating magic range type
Rst column shows 'Wp' indicating Willpower resist
